overall.description: Bus simulator gameplay footage showing a first-person perspective from the driver's cabin during heavy rain. The bus travels along wet urban roads, passes through an underpass, navigates a busy intersection with large trucks, and circulates around a roundabout before turning onto a new road section.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban arterial road with tree-lined sidewalks

events.description: passing a red car parked on the right side of the road
overtaking a white sedan moving in the same direction

agents.ego_description: operating the bus at steady speed along the wet road, windshield wipers active

notable_agents.action: red car parked on the roadside, stationary
white sedan driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: dense row of green trees lining the left side of the street
dense row of green trees lining the right side of the street
line of parked vehicles along the right curb
multi-story apartment blocks visible through the trees on the left
rain-soaked asphalt with visible reflections and puddles

segments.scene_description: The bus drives along a tree-lined urban road during heavy rain, with windshield wipers sweeping across the view. Parked cars line the right side while residential buildings are visible through the trees on the left. The bus passes a red parked car and overtakes a white sedan while maintaining steady progress down the wet multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: road passing under concrete overpass bridge

events.description: entering the underpass, ambient light drops significantly
exiting the underpass, returning to natural daylight levels

agents.ego_description: maintaining speed while passing through the dimly lit underpass section

notable_agents.action: orange truck visible to the right when exiting the underpass

entered.detail: large concrete bridge structure spanning across the road ahead
shadowed tunnel section beneath the overpass with artificial lighting

segments.scene_description: The bus approaches and passes through a concrete underpass, experiencing a dramatic shift from natural daylight to dim artificial lighting and back. The windshield wipers continue operating as the bus emerges from the sheltered section, with an orange truck visible on the right side upon exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with roundabout and heavy vehicle traffic

events.description: approaching intersection, slowing behind large trucks stopped at traffic light
entering the roundabout, beginning circular navigation around the central island

agents.ego_description: slowing to navigate the intersection, waiting behind trucks, then circulating around the roundabout

notable_agents.action: large white truck directly ahead blocking the path at the intersection
blue truck entering the roundabout from the left

entered.detail: circular traffic island with vegetation in the center of the intersection
metal tram rails embedded in the road surface crossing the intersection
green directional sign indicating route to Hauptbahnhof (main train station)
overhead traffic signal ganttry spanning the intersection

segments.scene_description: The bus approaches a busy intersection, slowing behind large trucks waiting at a red light. After the light changes, the bus enters a roundabout with visible tram tracks, navigating around the central island while a blue truck merges from the left. A green Hauptbahnhof sign indicates the direction to the main train station.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban road with tram tracks after roundabout exit

events.description: executing right turn to exit the roundabout onto new road section

agents.ego_description: exiting the roundabout with a right turn, then accelerating along the new road with tram tracks

entered.detail: multi-story residential apartment buildings with balconies on the left side
tall modern street lighting poles along the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The bus exits the roundabout with a right turn, entering a new urban road section featuring embedded tram tracks. The surroundings shift to show residential apartment buildings on the left and modern street lamps on the right. The bus continues driving through the rain on this new route, with the windshield wipers maintaining visibility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus cabin as it navigates a rain-slicked urban environment, moving from a tree-lined residential street through a dim underpass and into a busy transit hub. It begins on a wet multi-lane road where windshield wipers sweep across the view of parked cars and residential buildings before the bus overtakes a white sedan. As the vehicle enters a concrete underpass, the natural daylight abruptly shifts to dim artificial lighting before brightening again upon exit, where an orange truck appears on the right. The scene then opens into a busy intersection and a roundabout with embedded tram tracks, navigating past large trucks and a green Hauptbahnhof sign. Finally, the bus makes a right turn to enter a new road section, passing modern street lamps and apartment buildings while continuing through the heavy rain.
